changeSet.author: analyze-logs
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE static_ua_classifier ( sort_order INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, pattern TEXT NOT NULL, ua_name TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES static_ua(ua_name) )

changeSet.author: analyze-logs
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO static_ua_classifier (sort_order, pattern, ua_name) VALUES -- AI crawlers (1, 'ClaudeBot', 'ClaudeBot'), (2, 'Claude-SearchBot', 'Claude-SearchBot'), (3, 'OAI-SearchBot', 'OAI-SearchBot'), (4, 'PerplexityBot', 'PerplexityBot'), -- SEO crawlers (5, 'AhrefsBot', 'AhrefsBot'), (6, 'SemrushBot', 'SemrushBot'), (7, 'SERankingBacklinksBot', 'SERankingBot'), (8, 'Barkrowler', 'Barkrowler'), (9, 'DotBot', 'DotBot'), (10, 'MJ12bot', 'MJ12bot'), (11, 'ev-crawler', 'HeadlineBot'), (12, 'PetalBot', 'PetalBot'), (13, 'coccocbot', 'CocCocBot'), (14, 'SeznamBot', 'SeznamBot'), -- Search bots (15, 'Googlebot', 'Googlebot'), (16, 'GoogleImageProxy', 'Google ImageProxy'), (17, 'FeedFetcher-Google', 'Google FeedFetcher'), (18, 'bingbot', 'Bingbot'), (19, 'YandexBot', 'YandexBot'), (20, 'Baiduspider', 'Baiduspider'), (21, 'DuckDuckBot', 'DuckDuckBot'), (22, 'Qwantbot', 'Qwantbot'), -- Security scanners (23, 'WellKnownBot', 'WellKnownBot'), (24, 'CensysInspect', 'Censys Scanner'), (25, 'Palo Alto Networks', 'Palo Alto Scanner'), (26, 'visionheight.com/scan', 'VisionHeight Scanner'), (27, '2ip bot', '2ip Scanner'), -- Feed readers (28, 'Feedly', 'Feedly'), (29, 'Feedbin', 'Feedbin'), (30, 'Reeder/', 'Reeder'), (31, 'FreshRSS', 'FreshRSS'), (32, 'NewsBlur', 'NewsBlur'), (33, 'rss-parser', 'rss-parser'), (34, 'sfFeedReader', 'sfFeedReader'), (35, 'feeder.co', 'Feeder'), (36, 'flus/', 'Flus'), (37, 'wp.com feedbot', 'WP.com FeedBot'), -- Fediverse (38, 'Mastodon', 'Mastodon'), (39, 'Misskey/', 'Misskey'), (40, 'SummalyBot', 'SummalyBot'), (41, 'Yumechi', 'Yumechi Proxy'), -- Social (42, 'facebookexternalhit', 'Facebook'), -- Apps (43, 'obsidian/', 'Obsidian'), (44, 'GSA/', 'Google Search App'), (45, 'okhttp/', 'okhttp'), (46, 'Go-http-client/', 'Go HTTP client'), -- Headless/suspicious (47, 'HeadlessChrome', 'HeadlessChrome')
